name: Aquascape Fountain Scale Free Water Treatment, 8-oz bottle
description: Help your finned friends breathe easily with the Aquascape Fountain Scale Free Fish WaterTreatment! This water treatment effectively eradicates hard water deposits, white scale and foam and helps keep your water clean and clear. Use regularly to prevent damage and clogging of pumps and plumbing. It features an enticing lavender smell, and it contains no chemicals or acids. It’s non-toxic, so it’s safe to use to keep your scaly sidekicks happy and healthy!
